---
name: Specification Update
about: Template for submitting specification updates
title: "[SPEC] Update <specification name>"
---

## Specification Update

### Specification Details
- **Name**: <!-- Name of the specification being updated -->
- **File Path**: <!-- Path to the specification file -->
- **Current Version**: <!-- Current version number -->
- **New Version**: <!-- New version number -->
- **Owner Team**: <!-- Team responsible for this specification -->

### Summary of Changes
<!-- Brief summary of the changes made to the specification -->

### Implementation Status Update
<!-- List of components with updated implementation percentages -->
- Component 1: XX% → YY%
- Component 2: XX% → YY%
- ...

### Type of Update
- [ ] Implementation status update
- [ ] New feature specification
- [ ] Architecture change
- [ ] Interface change
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe)

### Related PRs/Issues
<!-- Links to related code PRs or issues that prompted this spec update -->

### Cross-Team Impact
<!-- Description of how these changes affect other teams -->

### Verification Checklist
- [ ] Specification follows the standard template
- [ ] Frontmatter has been updated (version, last_updated, etc.)
- [ ] Version history has been updated
- [ ] All file references are valid
- [ ] Implementation percentages are consistent with SPECS.md
- [ ] Ran `specs/tools/spec_validation.sh` without errors
- [ ] Added required reviewers from all affected teams

### Screenshots/Additional Information
<!-- Add any screenshots or additional information that might be helpful -->
